highlights.title: Hide inactive temp-target presets from main chart
changes: New temp-target presets no longer appear on the main chart unless you activate them.
Cancelled temp targets no longer remain visible until the app is backgrounded.
The chart refreshes with the current time so recent temp-target changes are reflected immediately.

sources.title: nightscout/Trio#1325: Fix temp target presets showing up in the main chart

includedPullRequests.title: Fix temp target presets showing up in the main chart
includedPullRequests.body:
Fixes #1324

Saving a new Temp Target as a preset made it show up in the main chart even though it was never activated. The chart's fetch predicate freezes its date anchors when it is built and only re-anchors when the app comes to the foreground, so a fresh preset (date now, enabled false) matched the clause meant for scheduled temp targets. The same stale anchor also kept a cancelled temp target's full bar on the chart until the app was backgrounded.

Presets are now excluded from the scheduled clause, and the fetched results are filtered again with a fresh date before they reach the chart. Added tests covering the predicate and the visibility rules.
